response.overview: Madmans Esprit is a South Korean visual kei–influenced extreme metal band, blending extreme metal with intense emotional expression and narrative depth.  With approximately 55,000 monthly listeners on Spotify, the band has established a global audience.During their recent European headlining tour, Madmans Esprit performed across around 10 cities, drawing a total attendance of approximately 4,500 people. The tour included multiple sold-out shows across several countries, including the UK, Germany, Finland, Poland, and Romania, demonstrating consistent demand across regions.  The band continues to expand through European tours of increasing scale, while maintaining active live performances in Japan and Korea.
response.title: Madmans Esprit - 4th Album Documentary 「連結」
